name: Uninsured for AI referral malpractice—what options?
description: Sue firm assets; most insured via referrals.[4]

mainEntity.name: Uninsured for AI referral malpractice—what options?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sue firm assets; most insured via referrals.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Sue firm directly; most carry malpractice insurance, but if not, assets at risk. Referral fees often insured.[4] Factors: firm size (larger like multi-city have coverage). Small claims if under $10k. Bar disciplinary still free.
